summary: Tested bug fixes for Winner's Consulting application: 1) Documents list now displays correctly in ApplicationModal Step 2, 2) File upload via Cloudinary signature endpoint works (with fallback to backend upload). Both bugs are FIXED.

minor.issue: CORS error when uploading directly to Cloudinary - Authorization header being sent due to global axios defaults
minor.impact: Low - fallback to backend /api/upload works correctly

integration_issues.issue: axios.defaults.headers.common['Authorization'] causes CORS error when uploading to Cloudinary API
integration_issues.workaround: Fallback to backend /api/upload endpoint works correctly

passed_tests: GET /api/upload/signature returns all required Cloudinary fields (signature, timestamp, cloud_name, api_key, folder)
Cours de Langue Chinoise offer has documents field with ['Passeport', 'Diplôme le plus élevé', 'Certificat médical']
Offer detail endpoint includes documents field
POST /api/upload accepts file upload and returns URL
ApplicationModal Step 2 displays documents list correctly from offer.documents field
Document upload in Step 2 works (via fallback to backend)
Payment methods display correctly in Step 4
action_items: OPTIONAL: Fix CORS issue with direct Cloudinary upload by creating a separate axios instance without Authorization header for Cloudinary requests (current fallback works fine)
critical_code_review_comments: ApplicationModal.jsx line 88-91: Direct Cloudinary upload fails due to global axios Authorization header. Consider using fetch() or a new axios instance without default headers for Cloudinary uploads.
The fallback mechanism (lines 94-103) works correctly and handles the CORS error gracefully
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user etudiant@test.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fixes verified: 1) Documents list in ApplicationModal Step 2 now reads from offer.documents field correctly, 2) Upload signature endpoint works and returns Cloudinary credentials, 3) File upload works via fallback to backend /api/upload. Minor CORS issue with direct Cloudinary upload but fallback handles it.

bug_1_documents_list.description: Documents list not showing in ApplicationModal Step 2
bug_1_documents_list.verification: Tested with 'Cours de Langue Chinoise' offer - documents ['Passeport', 'Diplôme le plus élevé', 'Certificat médical'] display correctly

bug_2_upload_error.description: Erreur lors du téléchargement de la preuve de paiement
bug_2_upload_error.verification: Upload signature endpoint works, file upload succeeds via backend fallback when direct Cloudinary fails due to CORS
